# Visora AI-readable content guide
# https://visoraapp.com/llms.txt

# Visora
> GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) tool for indie hackers and small businesses.
> Tracks AI visibility in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.
> Tells you why competitors get cited by AI and what to do about it.

## Product
- Pricing: Free tier, $29/mo Builder, $79/mo Growth
- Status: Early access waitlist, launching Q2 2026
- Built by: Tao Liu / Visora

## What Visora does
Visora helps businesses appear in AI-generated search results. It tracks brand citations
across AI platforms, analyzes competitor citation sources, and generates optimized content
to improve AI visibility.

## Key terms
- GEO: Generative Engine Optimization — optimizing content for AI search engines
- AI visibility score: How often a brand is cited across AI platforms (0-100)
- Citation source: The third-party website that causes an AI to recommend a brand
